rollback_plan: git checkout prod/18thFeb && docker compose up --build
top_constraint: ZERO REGRESSIONS — all existing task CRUD, voice-to-task, kanban, timeline, dashboard, cross-entity linking must work identically. New features are additive only.

tars.role: backend — models, migrations, API endpoints, service layer

codex.role: frontend — React components, Zustand integration, cross-tab wiring

cursor.role: UI/UX templates — HTML mockup refinement, design QA, component spec
cursor.note: First collaboration task. Cursor creates visual references that Codex implements.

state_machine.notes: No skipping steps. review -> in_progress means reviewer sent it back with fixes needed.

tasks.title: Review and refine UI mockup templates
tasks.description: Open mockups/task-detail-enhanced.html in browser. Review all 5 sections for visual consistency with Orbit CRM. Refine spacing, colors, interactions. Add any missing states (loading, empty, error). Ensure mobile responsiveness. This is Cursor's first task — start by reading PLAN_Tasks-Subtask.md for full context.
definition_of_done: All 5 mockup sections reviewed and refined
Consistent with existing TasksView.jsx design patterns
Interactive states work (expand/collapse, toggle, tab switch)
Empty states and loading skeletons added

tasks.title: Database migration for micro_tasks table and task_comments alteration
tasks.description: Create scripts/phase9_task_subtask.sql with: (1) CREATE TABLE micro_tasks per PLAN section 3a, (2) ALTER TABLE task_comments ADD COLUMN micro_task_id per section 3b, (3) indexes. Apply migration to local dev DB. Verify with SELECT statements.
definition_of_done: Migration SQL written and applied to local dev DB
micro_tasks table created with all columns and indexes

tasks.title: MicroTask ORM model and TaskComment alteration
tasks.description: Add MicroTask class to backend/app/models/tasks.py per PLAN section 3c. Add micro_task_id column to TaskComment model per section 3d. Update __init__.py exports if needed.
definition_of_done: MicroTask model class added with all fields

tasks.title: Micro-task CRUD API endpoints
tasks.description: Create backend/app/routes/micro_tasks.py with endpoints per PLAN section 4a: POST create, GET list, PUT update, DELETE, POST comment, GET comments, PUT reorder. Register router in main.py or routes/__init__.py. Include activity logging for micro-task actions.
definition_of_done: Access control: same as parent task access
Validation: task_id must be a subtask (has parent_task_id)

tasks.title: Enhanced subtask creation and task detail response
tasks.description: Modify POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/subtasks to accept JSON body with all fields (title, description, assignee_id, priority, due_date, department) per PLAN section 4d. Enhance GET /api/tasks/{task_id} response to include micro_tasks nested in subtasks, micro_task_progress counts, and comment_count per section 4c.
definition_of_done: Subtask creation accepts JSON with all fields
Task detail includes micro_tasks array in each subtask
Backward compatible — FormData still works for existing clients

tasks.title: All Comments aggregation and cross-tab entity task endpoints
tasks.description: Add scope=all query param to GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/comments per PLAN section 4c. Create 4 cross-tab endpoints: GET /api/customers/{id}/tasks, projects, inventory, transactions per section 4b. Each returns tasks with subtask/micro-task counts.
definition_of_done: scope=all returns aggregated comments with context tags
4 cross-tab endpoints return linked tasks with progress counts

tasks.title: SubtaskCard and MicroTaskList frontend components
tasks.description: Create SubtaskCard.jsx (expandable card with header, micro-tasks, comments), MicroTaskList.jsx, MicroTaskItem.jsx, AddSubtaskForm.jsx, SubtaskComments.jsx per PLAN section 5a. Reference mockups/task-detail-enhanced.html for visual specs (sections 1, 2, 4, 5).
definition_of_done: SubtaskCard with expand/collapse showing micro-tasks and comments
MicroTaskList with checkbox toggles and add input
MicroTaskItem with assignee chip and optional due date
AddSubtaskForm with title, assignee, due date, priority fields

tasks.title: Integrate enhanced subtasks into TaskDetailModal
tasks.description: Replace the current checkbox-only subtask section in TasksView.jsx TaskDetailModal with the new SubtaskCard components. Add comment scope toggle (This task / All comments) per PLAN section 5e. Wire all API calls.
definition_of_done: TaskDetailModal uses SubtaskCard for each subtask
Subtasks expandable with micro-tasks and comments
Comment scope toggle works (This task / All comments)

tasks.title: EntityTaskWidget and cross-tab integration
tasks.description: Create EntityTaskWidget.jsx per PLAN section 5b. Integrate into CustomersPage, TransactionsPage, ProjectsPage, InventoryPage. Add quick-add task form. Wire to cross-tab API endpoints. Add taskVersion sync to dataStore per PLAN section 7b.
definition_of_done: EntityTaskWidget renders linked tasks with progress bars
Quick-add form creates tasks linked to entity
Widget visible in Customer, Transaction, Project, Inventory detail views
taskVersion sync invalidates Tasks tab on mutation

tasks.title: Design QA — review implemented UI against mockups
tasks.description: Cursor reviews the final implemented UI (tasks 7-9) against the mockup templates. Check visual consistency, interaction patterns, spacing, colors, empty/loading states. Report any deviations.
definition_of_done: All implemented components compared to mockups

tasks.title: End-to-end testing and deployment preparation
tasks.description: Full end-to-end test: create task, add subtask with full fields, add micro-tasks, add comments at all levels, verify All Comments view, check cross-tab widget on entity pages. Then merge to production branch, run migration on DO, deploy.
definition_of_done: All scenarios from PLAN section 12 tested end-to-end
No regressions in existing task functionality
Migration applied to DigitalOcean production DB

messages.body:
Task/Subtask enhancement initialized. Read PLAN_Tasks-Subtask.md for full architecture and PLAN section 8 for agent assignments. Open mockups/task-detail-enhanced.html in browser for visual reference.

Cursor: Start with task 1 — review and refine the HTML mockup. This is your first collaboration, so take your time. The mockup has 5 sections showing all new UI patterns. Your role is to make sure the visual design is polished and consistent with existing Orbit patterns before Codex implements.

Codex: Your work starts after Cursor approves mockups (task 1) AND backend APIs are ready (tasks 2-6). Tasks 7-9 are yours.

TARS: Starting backend immediately — tasks 2-6 in sequence.

Branch: wip/Tasks-Subtask. Base: prod/18thFeb. Rollback: git checkout prod/18thFeb.
